item.title: 2023 Fragments
item.author: Author
item.description: January Suddenly became interested in cell phone photography. On my way home from the library, I saw a girl with a very large flower balloon and took a picture of her back: Forgot the day I ate spicy hot pot with tomato flavor base near the office: The red lanterns hanging from the streetlights can already be seen on the footbridge on the way home from work: Weekend shopping at the mall with my cousin.
